title: heliotropium sibiricum var. sibiricum
intro: Heliotropium sibiricum var. sibiricum, also known as Siberian heliotrope, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family and is native to Siberia and other parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Siberian heliotrope include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, and it also has a positive effect on the cardiovascular system by reducing blood pressure and improving blood circulation. Siberian heliotrope can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
